name_en: Top-tier original, comes with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original, comes with full packaging
🤟Miss Dior Flap Bag 'Black Graffiti'
This Miss Dior Flap Bag made its debut at the Dior Fall/Winter 2024 Haute Couture show, reinterpreting the modern elegance of the Dior classic. Crafted from black calfskin, paired with a contrasting enamel metal plate featuring the classic Miss Dior Graffiti pattern, showcasing enduring aesthetics. The main compartment under the flap features a zip pocket for organizing daily essentials. With an adjustable strap, it can be worn over the shoulder for a high-fashion look.
Main material: Calfskin
Lining: Calfskin
Enamel Miss Dior Graffiti plate
Magnetic flap closure
Adjustable leather shoulder strap
Internal compartment
Internal zip pocket and slip pocket
Model: 2610
Dimensions: 22 x 11 x 6 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 wallet, and lipstick
